title: Automation Enhancement for Items & Subitems to show automatically show the same labels for specific columns

posts.author: amy.schaffer (Amy Schaffer)
posts.cookedHtml:
The ability to create a custom automation that would for example:

If the project status (column) at the item level is set to any label automatically update the project status (column) label at the subitem level with the same label.
